metadata.title: Charging stops cleanly when surplus falls below minimum threshold
metadata.description: When solar generation drops such that the available surplus amps would be below minAmpsPerTWC, TWCManager must stop charging entirely rather than command an illegal sub-minimum current. After surplus recovers, charging should resume.

timeline.label: Cloud cover — surplus collapses to 500W net (≈2.1A — below minimum 6A)
Sun returns — surplus recovers to 3.5kW net

assertions.description: System should be charging above minimum amps

checks.description: Must charge at or above minAmpsPerTWC

assertions.description: System must stop charging — never command below minimum

checks.description: Commanded amps must be 0 when surplus is below minimum threshold

assertions.description: Charging should resume when surplus recovers above minimum

checks.description: Must resume charging once surplus is sufficient
